title: ammoselinum popei
intro: Ammoselinum popei, also known as Pope's Ammoselinum, is a plant species within the carrot family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Ammoselinum popei include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
